summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of AL ZAHEER RETAIL RATELIST PANEL PWA. Tested splash screen, home with 3 category cards, admin PIN setup+verify, brand tabs, sales vs admin column rendering, the critical admin->sales invoice sync, FAB visibility, row addition with PRM live auto-calc, search, settings, shop profile persistence, share modal (admin vs sales templates), localStorage persistence across reload, master password gate, and category PIN. 26/26 primary assertions passed in batch 1, and add-row + PRM autocalc + master-pw set + templates confirmed in batch 2. 0 console errors across all flows.

issues: Variant column truncates content (e.g., '4GB/128GB Black' shows as '4GB/128GB' — color suffix cut off due to fixed input width). Consider increasing variant column width or allowing overflow ellipsis on hover.

nav-settings-btn directly opens Settings in sales mode without any PIN/role guard (BottomNav line 775). Header settings-btn correctly requires admin PIN. This inconsistency lets a sales user access shop profile, autolock select, Export/Import/Reset. The master-password gate still protects PIN changes inside, but Export/Reset are NOT gated. Recommend either gating nav-settings-btn the same way or moving destructive actions (Reset, Import, Change Admin PIN) behind master password.

action_items: (Optional) Widen Variant column or add tooltip to prevent text truncation in RateTable

(Security) Decide on whether sales users should access Settings via bottom nav; currently nav-settings-btn bypasses the admin-PIN gate that header-settings-btn enforces. At minimum, gate Reset / Import / Export with master password or admin role.
critical_code_review_comments: App.js is 1673 lines — should be split into components folder (Home, Category, RateTable, modals, Settings, Search) for maintainability (>700 line guideline).

hashPIN uses non-crypto djb2 hash + length suffix — acceptable per code comment ('app-level PIN gating only') since this is a frontend-only local PWA with no real auth boundary. Documented as such, OK for MVP.
BottomNav nav-settings-btn (line 775) bypasses the admin gate present on header-settings-btn (line 498). Inconsistent gating.

lockToggle returns to verify mode if pinHash exists, but if user never set a PIN, header-lock-btn opens 'set' modal — good. However tapping nav-settings-btn opens Settings directly even without admin: user could remove master password / reset data without admin auth.
Toast undo timer is 4000ms — short; if user blinks they lose undo. Consider 6-8s.
useEffect that increments openCount runs on mount but is in same render as setState(loadState) — could cause double increment in StrictMode dev builds. Minor.
No data-testid on close (X) buttons of modals; have to rely on backdrop clicks or Cancel buttons in test scripts.
test_credentials: Admin PIN set during test: 1234. Master Password set during test: TestPass123!. Category (smartphones) PIN: 5678.
seed_data_creation: App seeds DEFAULT_DATA brands/products from App.js on first load. Test cleared localStorage 'az_ratelist_v1' before each batch to ensure clean state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only PWA at https://zaheer-pricing.preview.emergentagent.com. Storage key 'az_ratelist_v1'. Clear before testing. Admin cells are <input> elements — to assert their values in Playwright use input.value (not textContent). Critical bug-fix being validated (admin invoice edit → sales view sync) WORKS correctly. data-testid attributes are comprehensive. emergent-badge can be hidden via document.getElementById('emergent-badge').style.display='none'. App is auto-locking after autoLockMin minutes of inactivity but timer is 30s polled so tests under 30s are safe.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no defects found. Main sync fix verified working end-to-end: edited invoice cell (cell-<id>-invoice) in admin to 99999 → locked admin → switched to sales view → 99,999 appears in Invoice column → reloaded page → still 99,999 (persisted in localStorage).
